items.title: Set up shared PTO calendar for Yanina
items.summary: Yanina's Q3/Q4 Argentine holidays and PTO have been approved. Need to create a shared calendar for her out-of-office dates that can be toggled on/off.
items.actionNeeded: Set up a shared calendar with Yanina for her approved PTO dates that can be toggled on your calendar.
